name: Minecraft Server
compose:
name: "slashnode-minecraft"
services:
  minecraft:
    image: "itzg/minecraft-server:latest"
    container_name: "minecraft"
    restart: "unless-stopped"
    networks:
      - slashnode
    ports:
      - "25565:25565"
    volumes:
      - "minecraft-data:/data"
    environment:
      EULA: "TRUE"
      VERSION: "${input.VERSION}"
      MEMORY: "${input.MEMORY}"
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  minecraft-data:
    name: "slashnode-minecraft_minecraft_minecraft-data"
notes: Connect from Minecraft Java Edition to <your-host>:25565. By installing you accept the Minecraft EULA.
